raw:
## Completed
Implemented Phase A capture for Foreman: per-agent live transcript JSONL files, activity.json phase updates, machine-local ignores, and acceptance coverage.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - captures agent stream events and writes capped live transcript files; updates activity per phase.
- `extensions/foreman/ledger.ts` - added `transcriptsDir()` and atomic `writeActivity()`.
- `.pi/.gitignore` - ignores `plans/*/activity.json`.
- `extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh` - added transcript/activity JSON assertions.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh`

## Notes
Verified successfully with the command above.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
